title: disa neglecta
intro: Disa neglecta, also known as the Disa neglecta orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Disa neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its possible role in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Disa neglecta is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
